    |           |           |           |
    +-----+-----+           +-----+-----+
          v                       v
    +-----------+           +-----------+
    |  Merge 1  |           |  Merge 2  |
    +-----+-----+           +-----+-----+
          |                       |
          +-----------+-----------+
                      v
                 +---------+
                 |  Final  |
                 +---------+
